summary: Completed frontend testing of Employee Projects feature. All features working correctly: sidebar navigation, project list display, project expansion with details, time tracking widget with start/stop functionality, and admin dashboard pending requests count.
critical_code_review_comments: EmployeeSidebar.jsx: Clean implementation with FolderKanban icon for My Projects link
EmployeeProjects.jsx: Well-structured component with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Admin dashboard-stats API correctly returns total_pending_requests combining corrections and leave requests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Projects feature fully tested and working. Key test points: 1) My Projects link in sidebar navigates to /employee/projects, 2) Projects page shows 4 assigned projects with descriptions, 3) Clicking project expands to show created date, estimated hours, progress bar, 4) Time Tracker widget allows selecting project and starting/stopping time tracking, 5) Admin dashboard shows combined pending requests count (corrections + leave).

employee_sidebar_my_projects_link.details: My Projects link with FolderKanban icon visible in sidebar, navigates to /employee/projects

employee_projects_page_navigation.details: Successfully navigated to /employee/projects page after login

project_list_display.details: Shows 4 active projects assigned to employee with name, description, and time logged

project_expansion_details.details: Clicking project expands to show: description, created date (Jan 8, 2026), estimated hours (Est. 40h), progress bar (0%)

time_tracker_widget.details: Project selector dropdown works, description input works, Start Tracking button starts timer, Stop button stops tracking

admin_dashboard_pending_requests.details: Admin dashboard shows 'Pending Requests' stat with combined count of corrections + leave requests (currently 0)
